task: Take this floor plan and add furniture to it. REMOVE all text labels that appear in the input image (like room names). Keep the walls, doors, and room shapes exactly the same, but OUTPUT should have NO TEXT AT ALL - completely clean with only walls and furniture.

input_instructions.keep: walls, doors, windows, room shapes, layout
input_instructions.remove: ALL text labels, room names, letters - the output must be text-free

furniture_rules.view: Show all furniture from directly above (bird's eye view)
furniture_rules.plants: small solid circles only - no leaves
furniture_rules.shelves: rectangles from above - no visible books
furniture_rules.all_items: simple geometric shapes seen from above

OUTPUT_MUST_BE: Text-free - NO letters, NO words, NO labels anywhere
Remove all room name labels like KH, ET, ULKOTILA, etc.
Only show: walls, doors, windows, and furniture
negative_prompt: text, labels, letters, words, room names, KH, ET, VH, TK, ULKOTILA, TUPAKEITTIO, ALKOVI, front view furniture, book spines, plant leaves
